title: Incredible Enchantment
description: Added many wonderful enchantments to the game
body:
# 
**Added many wonderful enchantments to the game
In the first version,I have added 13 Enchanting.
They can use on sword,axe,pickaxe,shovel.
They can also get from the enchanting table!
I get one of them to make a example**
# 
### Lumbering
**You can accumulate axe moves by digging logs. When the axe moves reach over 400, attacking creatures will unleash a heavy blow and consume these axe moves**
### Asphyxia
**Causing organisms to enter a state of suffocation and continuously reducing their lives**
### Pounding and striking
**Remote launch of shovels for attacking and altering grasslands**
### Blast
**Probability of explosion during excavation of stones and deep slate**
